name: MikroTik hEX refresh
title: MikroTik hEX 2024 Router – Gigabit Ethernet Wired Router with RouterOS
title_extended: MikroTik hEX 2024 Router – Gigabit Ethernet Wired Router with RouterOS
description: The MikroTik hEX Refresh, also known as E50UG, has twice the performance of its predecessor MikroTik hEX due to its advanced EN7562CT CPU running at 950MHz. Combined with 512 MB of RAM, the hEX Refresh ensures smooth, rapid data handling, ideal for multitasking and network-intensive applications. Its increased speed and processing power ensure superior functionality and reliability, establishing the hEX Refresh as an invaluable solution for users seeking budget-friendly and high-performance routing.

detailed_description.heading: Enhanced Performance
detailed_description.text: The MikroTik hEX Refresh, also known as E50UG, has twice the performance of its predecessor MikroTik hEX due to its advanced EN7562CT CPU running at 950MHz. Combined with 512 MB of RAM, the hEX Refresh ensures smooth, rapid data handling, ideal for multitasking and network-intensive applications. Its increased speed and processing power ensure superior functionality and reliability, establishing the hEX Refresh as an invaluable solution for users seeking budget-friendly and high-performance routing.

Equipped with five 10/100/1000 Gigabit Ethernet ports, the hEX Refresh offers flexible, high-speed connections for a wide range of network devices, from computers and smart home devices to NAS units and IP cameras. The Gigabit Ethernet speeds ensure rapid data transfer rates for both personal and small office setups, supporting tasks like streaming, gaming, and downloading with minimal delay. Additionally, the device includes a USB Type-A port, which enables further customization through USB-based storage or other peripherals, making it highly adaptable to various network configurations.

The hEX Refresh comes with RouterOS Level 4 licensing, giving users access to advanced routing features, firewall configurations, VPNs, and bandwidth management tools. With 128 MB of NAND storage, this router can comfortably handle a variety of configurations, logs, and updates without slowing down, ensuring uninterrupted operation. RouterOS provides the flexibility and control that experienced network users and IT professionals need for optimized network management, making it ideal for both home users and those needing advanced network control.

This router is designed with versatility in mind, featuring two power methods: a DC Jack and Passive PoE-In, allowing you to position it conveniently within any setup. The package includes a 24V 0.38A power adapter, making it easy to start without additional equipment. This efficient power consumption means lower operational costs, while the device’s compact design ensures it can be integrated seamlessly into any space. For users looking for reliable, high-speed, and cost-effective network solutions, the MikroTik hEX Refresh is a robust option built for both ease of use and flexibility.

EU Declaration of Conformity / CE DOC - MikroTik hEX refresh

comments.name: prc
comments.text:
While bit harder to configure compared to something like edgerouter poe, this little thing can do about everything, it has enough cpu to do about everything. It runs cool in bad placement, where my erpoe-5 was horribly hot. Only VPN is a question of how much bandwidth you need, if you want to use it via router. I run openVPN on PC, so not issue for me.

All in all, best router box for this price and I think the price is very reasonable.

comments.name: Andreas
comments.text: Good for getting familiar with the mikrotik "ecosystem" now in the arm-world

comments.name: Tarmo
comments.text: It wasn't too difficult to transfer the device configuration from the old Mikrotik hEX device to the new one.
